member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Test.Console.BwlConsoleTestLoggerWriter.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writer для получения записей из лога и передачи в WebUI

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Test.Console.Program.LogSettingsValue(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: This function contiuously adds values from settings to the log with 5 second intervals
